g.text: Scram! ...Oh fine, what do you want? 🗑️
2. Use @ to dig through your file garbage. I mean, codebase.
3. Type /help if you're lost (no surprise there), or / for commands
> do it again, mark it as a high risk action though
Type your message, @mention a file, or / for commands
